Identify and Flag Colony Attendance Periods

Source: R/trip_utils.R
identify_colony_visits.Rd

Computes the great-circle distance from telemetry positions to colony coordinates and flags points that fall within a defined colony radius.

identify_colony_visits(
  track,
  lon_col = "longitude",
  lat_col = "latitude",
  colony_lon_col = "lon_colony",
  colony_lat_col = "lat_colony",
  radius_m = 200,
  distance_col = "dist_to_colony_m",
  colony_flag_col = "at_colony"
)

Arguments

track

A data frame or tibble containing track coordinates.

lon_col

Character. Longitude column. Default is `"longitude"`.

lat_col

Character. Latitude column. Default is `"latitude"`.

colony_lon_col

Character. Colony longitude column. Default is `"lon_colony"`.

colony_lat_col

Character. Colony latitude column. Default is `"lat_colony"`.

radius_m

Numeric. Colony attendance radius in meters. Default is `200`.

distance_col

Character. Name of calculated distance column. Default is `"dist_to_colony_m"`.

colony_flag_col

Character. Name of logical colony flag column. Default is `"at_colony"`.

Value

A data frame with distance-to-colony and colony-attendance columns.

Contents
